notes: Gen-3 iter-10: single-step upload tool (click+upload atomic), single-phase decide_chat (respects two_phase=False), turn-1 fix. Iter-9 scored 10/17 — personal data complete, zero uploads (old two-step upload broke at documents step).

ground_truth.form_type: 4-step multi-step wizard modal (click Bewirb dich first)
ground_truth.success_signal: Page text contains 'Vielen Dank' or 'Bewerbung übermittelt' OR URL changes to confirmation path
ground_truth.known_challenges: reCAPTCHA v3 (silent), file upload (single-step: trigger ref + file path), Absenden vs Weiter on final step
